rules.rule_text:
title: APT31 Judgement Panda Activity
id: 03e2746e-2b31-42f1-ab7a-eb39365b2422
status: test
description: Detects APT31 Judgement Panda activity as described in the Crowdstrike
  2019 Global Threat Report
references:
- https://www.documentcloud.org/documents/5743766-Global-Threat-Report-2019.html
author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
date: 2019-02-21
modified: 2023-03-10
tags:
- attack.collection
- attack.lateral-movement
- attack.credential-access
- attack.g0128
- attack.t1003.001
- attack.t1560.001
- detection.emerging-threats
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_ldifde:
    CommandLine|contains|all:
    - ldifde
    - -f -n
    - eprod.ldf
  selection_lateral_movement:
    CommandLine|contains|all:
    - copy \\\\
    - c$
    CommandLine|contains:
    - \aaaa\procdump64.exe
    - \aaaa\netsess.exe
    - \aaaa\7za.exe
    - \c$\aaaa\
  condition: 1 of selection_*
falsepositives:
- Unlikely
level: critical
